# Tensorbinge
> Open research collective building tools at the intersection of machine
> learning, quantitative finance, and systems engineering.

## Products
- [Simulor](https://pypi.org/project/simulor/): Event-driven quantitative
  backtesting framework with realistic execution models.
- [LogRoller](https://crates.io/crates/logroller): Log rotation library
  for Rust — size-based, time-based, and hybrid strategies. Zero runtime
  overhead after rotation.
- [MarkScope](https://markscope.tensorbinge.com): Cross-platform Markdown
  previewer with live rendering, syntax highlighting, and AI-assisted
  editing.

## Research
- **Machine Learning:** Deep learning theory, optimization, neural
  architectures, representation learning. We study what makes models
  generalize and when they fail.
- **Quantitative Finance:** Alpha research, factor models, execution,
  market microstructure. Systematic strategies built and backtested
  against real market data.
- **LLM Engineering:** Fine-tuning, RAG, evaluation, inference
  optimization. Applying language models to real problems with rigorous
  measurement.

## Links
- Blog: https://blog.tensorbinge.com
- GitHub: https://github.com/tensorbinge
